# RBX Labs

RBX Labs is an applied AI studio. It helps companies build AI products, AI workflows, and AI-enabled go-to-market systems.

## Primary pages
- Home: https://rbx-labs.io/
- About: https://rbx-labs.io/about.html
- Approach: https://rbx-labs.io/approach.html
- AI Training: https://rbx-labs.io/ai-training.html
- Case study / product example: https://rbx-labs.io/network-guardian.html

## What RBX Labs does
- Builds AI-powered products and internal tools
- Designs AI workflows that reduce manual work and improve throughput
- Creates AI-enabled go-to-market systems for research, content, outreach, qualification, and sales support
- Runs AI training through workshops, sprints, and adoption programs

## Proof points
- 25% activation lift from ranking improvements in a community product
- 40% reduction in manual review from trust-led moderation systems
- 30% throughput gain from AI workflow transformation
- 98%+ valid itineraries with a 12-second P95 pipeline in a TravelTech venture
- 5.8K+ learners trained across AI, product, and innovation programs
